task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a spreadsheet application window with 'indie_film_budget.xlsx' in the title bar, or a file manager window showing this file located in the '~/Documents/Spreadsheets/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a sheet renamed to 'Detail'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a sheet tab named 'Detail' at the bottom of the spreadsheet interface.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Fringes' and 'Total_Cost' are calculated on the 'Detail' sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Detail' sheet, look for columns named 'Fringes' and 'Total_Cost'. 'Fringes' should show 0 for 'Non-Labor' rows and non-zero values for 'Labor' rows. 'Total_Cost' should visually appear to be the sum of 'Base_Cost' and 'Fringes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Top Sheet' is created with a summary table in cells A1:B8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a sheet tab named 'Top Sheet'. Within this sheet, cells A1:B8 should contain a summary table with labels for Above-the-Line, Below-the-Line, Post-Production, Subtotal, Contingency, Completion Bond, and Grand Total.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Top Sheet' correctly aggregates the main categories from the 'Detail' sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Top Sheet', look at the values next to the main categories. The 'Above-the-Line' value must be 1052600 and the 'Post-Production' value must be 546200.

task_completion.description: Verify the Subtotal, Contingency, Completion Bond, and Grand Total are calculated on the 'Top Sheet'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Top Sheet', look at the final calculation rows. The Contingency should be exactly 10% of the Subtotal, the Completion Bond should be exactly 3% of the sum of Subtotal and Contingency, and the Grand Total should sum these components.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical spreadsheet application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a GUI spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc) open and being interacted with, rather than just a text editor or terminal output.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used formulas for calculations rather than hardcoding answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: If a calculated cell (like Contingency, Bond, or Grand Total) is selected in the screenshots, the formula bar should display an actual spreadsheet formula (e.g., '=B4*0.10' or '=SUM(...)') instead of a typed-in static number.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script to bypass manual GUI work.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible showing Python scripts or command-line tools being executed to directly generate the 'indie_film_budget.xlsx' file with the final answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified expected values for the VLM to check: The 'Above-the-Line' total is 1052600.0. The 'Post-Production' total is 546200.0. The sum of all 'Fringes' on the Detail sheet is 310860.0.
